2604.12596.title: KumoRFM-2: Scaling Foundation Models for Relational Learning
2604.12596.paper_summary: We introduce KumoRFM-2, the next iteration of a pre-trained foundation model for relational data. KumoRFM-2 supports in-context learning as well as fine-tuning and is applicable to a wide range of predictive tasks. In contrast to tabular foundation models, KumoRFM-2 natively operates on relational data, processing one or more connected tables simultaneously without manual table flattening or target variable generation, all while preserving temporal consistency. KumoRFM-2 leverages a large corpus of synthetic and real-world data to pre-train across four axes: the row and column dimensions at the individual table level, and the foreign key and cross-sample dimensions at the database level. In contrast to its predecessor, KumoRFM-2 injects task information as early as possible, enabling sharper selection of task-relevant columns and improved robustness to noisy data. Through extensive experiments on 41 challenging benchmarks and analysis around expressivity and sensitivity, we demonstrate that KumoRFM-2 outperforms supervised and foundational approaches by up to 8%, while maintaining strong performance under extreme settings of cold start and noisy data. To our knowledge, this is the first time a few-shot foundation model has been shown to surpass supervised approaches on common benchmark tasks, with performance further improving upon fine-tuning. Finally, while KumoRFM-1 was limited to small-scale in-memory datasets, KumoRFM-2 scales to billion-scale relational datasets.
2604.12596.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 KumoRFM-2，這是一個用於關聯數據的預訓練基礎模型的下一個版本。<lb/>KumoRFM-2 支持上下文學習以及微調，並適用於各種預測任務。<lb/>與表格基礎模型相比，KumoRFM-2 原生運行於關聯數據上，能夠同時處理一個或多個連接的表格，而無需手動扁平化表格或生成目標變量，並且保持時間一致性。<lb/>KumoRFM-2 利用大量的合成和真實世界數據，在四個維度上進行預訓練：單個表格層級的行和列維度，以及數據庫層級的外鍵和交叉樣本維度。<lb/>與其前身相比，KumoRFM-2 盡早注入任務信息，從而實現更精確的任務相關列選擇，並提高對噪聲數據的魯棒性。<lb/>通過在 41 個具有挑戰性的基準測試上的廣泛實驗以及對表達性和敏感性的分析，我們證明 KumoRFM-2 在性能上超越了監督式和基礎方法，提升幅度可達 8%，同時在冷啟動和噪聲數據的極端情況下保持強勁的表現。<lb/>據我們所知，這是首次顯示少量樣本基礎模型在常見基準任務上超越監督方法的情況，且在微調後性能進一步提升。<lb/>最後，雖然 KumoRFM-1 限於小規模內存數據集，但 KumoRFM-2 能夠擴展到十億規模的關聯數據集。
2604.12596.author: Valter Hudovernik et.al.
2604.12596.authors: Valter Hudovernik, Federico López, Vid Kocijan, Akihiro Nitta, Jan Eric Lenssen, Jure Leskovec, Matthias Fey
